default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Jesse Rowe (Tavus) and Kyle Gaudreau (GrowthX) to explore potential collaboration on growth and content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tavus is in a growth phase, with Jesse recently joining to lead growth efforts and build out the team](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and strategy services, leveraging both AI tools and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to a follow-up meeting to dive deeper into GrowthX's capabilities and potential alignment with Tavus' needs](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Tavus' Current Growth Initiatives

  - [Jesse joined Tavus last month to head up growth, currently in a validation phase for campaigns and channels](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Building automated outbound email engine (150 domains, 400 email accounts by end of August)](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [June was a record month for revenue and self-serve signups](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Focusing on cementing growth pillars for the next year across acquisition, lifecycle, and team building](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Tavus Product Overview

  - [Tavus focuses on Conversational Video Interface (CVI), differentiating from static video generation](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Allows creation of AI humans with custom parameters and training for conversational interactions](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Exploring multimodal components and product-led growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

### GrowthX's Offerings and Approach

  - [Combines AI-driven workflows with human expertise to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Services include content strategy, creation, and programmatic page generation](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Uses a modular approach, integrating various AI tools (e.g., Perplexity, Claude) with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Focuses on increasing website traffic and then optimizing for conversion](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Can create various content types, including lead magnets and repurposed content from existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Lead magnet creation for Tavus' diverse use cases and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Content strategy and scaling to support Tavus' growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Leveraging GrowthX's AI-powered workflows to accelerate content creation and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/mHEy_evZCP-V6Fss-P3yHLtR8YPFCEhF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps
